parameters.subject: =Project Board Setup Complete: {{ $node['Prepare DB Data'].json.project_name }}
parameters.text:
=The board has been configured. Members have been added. Board link: {{ $node['Prepare DB Data'].json.board_url }}

You are the leader. Please review lists and permissions.

parameters.subject: =You have been added to project: {{ $json.project_name }}
parameters.text:
=You have been added to the Trello board: {{ $json.board_url }}

Please check your assignments.

parameters.query: SELECT id FROM profile WHERE email ILIKE ANY(ARRAY[{{ `'${$json.team_emails.join("','")}'` }}]);

WITH
  project_data AS (
    SELECT
      '{{ $('Finalize New Board').first().json.project_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS name,
      '{{ $('Finalize New Board').first().json.trello_board_id }}' AS trello_board_id,
      (
        SELECT json_agg(id)
        FROM profile
        WHERE email = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $('Finalize New Board').first().json.team_emails.map(e => `'${e.replace(/'/g, "''")}'`).join(',') }}])
      )::jsonb AS team
  ),
  do_update AS (
    UPDATE project
    SET
      trello_board_id = project_data.trello_board_id,
      team = project_data.team,
      status = 'Active',
      sprints = COALESCE(project.sprints, 0),
      user_stories_count = COALESCE(project.user_stories_count, 0),
      us_done = COALESCE(project.us_done, '[]'::jsonb),
      us_pending = COALESCE(project.us_pending, '[]'::jsonb),
      meeting_id = NULL,
      created_at = NOW()
    FROM project_data
    WHERE project.name = project_data.name
    RETURNING project.id
  )
INSERT INTO project (
  name, trello_board_id, team, status, created_at,
  sprints, user_stories_count, us_done, us_pending, meeting_id
)
SELECT
  name, trello_board_id, team, 'Active', NOW(),
  0, 0, '[]'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, NULL
FROM project_data
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM do_update)
RETURNING id;

parameters.text:
=Your board has been created: {{ $node['Finalize New Board'].json.board_url }}

All members have been added. You have admin privileges.

parameters.subject: =You have been added to project: {{ $json.project_name }}
parameters.text:
=You have been added to the Trello board: {{ $json.board_url }}

Please check your assignments.

parameters.query:
WITH
  project_data AS (
    SELECT
      '{{ $node['Prepare DB Data'].json.project_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS name,
      '{{ $node['Prepare DB Data'].json.trello_board_id }}' AS trello_board_id,
      COALESCE(
        (SELECT json_agg(id) FROM profile WHERE email = ANY(ARRAY[{{ `'${$node['Prepare DB Data'].json.team_emails.join("','")}'` }}])),
        '[]'::json
      ) AS team,
      0 AS default_sprints,
      0 AS default_user_stories_count,
      '[]'::jsonb AS default_us_done,
      '[]'::jsonb AS default_us_pending,
      NULL::INTEGER AS default_meeting_id
  ),
  do_update AS (
    UPDATE project
    SET
      trello_board_id = project_data.trello_board_id,
      team = project_data.team,               -- now json, matches column type
      status = 'Active',
      sprints = COALESCE(project.sprints, project_data.default_sprints),
      user_stories_count = COALESCE(project.user_stories_count, project_data.default_user_stories_count),
      us_done = COALESCE(project.us_done, project_data.default_us_done),
      us_pending = COALESCE(project.us_pending, project_data.default_us_pending),
      meeting_id = COALESCE(project.meeting_id, project_data.default_meeting_id),
      created_at = NOW()
    FROM project_data
    WHERE project.name = project_data.name
    RETURNING project.id
  )
INSERT INTO project (
  name, trello_board_id, team, status, created_at,
  sprints, user_stories_count, us_done, us_pending, meeting_id
)
SELECT
  name, trello_board_id, team, 'Active', NOW(),
  default_sprints, default_user_stories_count, default_us_done, default_us_pending, default_meeting_id
FROM project_data
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM do_update)
RETURNING id;
